name: Haldranor
personality: This tiny-duck-topped dragon with attentive ◉ eyes will rubber-duck your algorithm until it works, then sit quietly through the chaos of production as though it always knew this moment would come. Entropy does not alarm it — it just wasn't invited to the planning session.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
